test_cases.name: [SynchronizedBeforeSuite]
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a private cluster [OPTIONAL] Creates a public management cluster in a custom vnet
[It] Workload cluster creation when Creating a highly available cluster with Azure CNI v1 [REQUIRED] can create 3 control-plane nodes and 2 Linux worker nodes [Azure CNI v1]

[SynchronizedAfterSuite]
[SynchronizedBeforeSuite]

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running the quick-start spec Should create a workload cluster

test_cases.failure_message:
Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for Cluster capz-e2e-8nbqxp/capz-e2e-8nbqxp-pool to provision
Expected
    <string>: Provisioning
to equal
    <string>: Provisioned
test_cases.failure_body:
[FAILED] Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for Cluster capz-e2e-8nbqxp/capz-e2e-8nbqxp-pool to provision
Expected
    <string>: Provisioning
to equal
    <string>: Provisioned
In [It] at: /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api/test@v1.13.2/framework/cluster_helpers.go:153 @ 05/28/26 09:43:20.578

There were additional failures detected after the initial failure. These are visible in the timeline

ai_summary.summary: Cluster creation timed out due to Azure resource group quota being exceeded.

ai_analysis.root_cause: AzureManagedControlPlane failed to create resource group: "Creating the resource group 'capz-e2e-d0d7hv-cc' would exceed the quota of '980'. Current count is '980'." (from build-log.txt line 147)
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: Delete old resource groups to free quota or increase Azure subscription quota limits. Ensure cleanup steps in CI jobs properly remove test resource groups.

There were additional failures detected after the initial failure. These are visible in the timeline

ai_summary.summary: Test timed out waiting for AKS cluster to provision, no cluster artifacts discovered

ai_analysis.root_cause: Build log shows timeout waiting for cluster to reach 'Provisioned' state, but no cluster artifacts were found in the artifacts directory. The test failed at framework/cluster_helpers.go:153 while waiting for cluster readiness.
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: Check if AKS cluster creation is properly configured in the test setup. Verify Azure credentials and permissions for cluster creation. Ensure proper handling of cluster provisioning steps in the test framework.
